Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 29th, 2006 (Wide) by MGM
Video Release: February 13th, 2007 by Weinstein Co./Genius
MPA Rating: PG-13 for language, crude and sexual content, and some violence.
Running Time: 101 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Remake
Plot point: False Identity, Love Triangle, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Tricked into a Relationship
Social setting: Self-help movement
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Picked Last, Media Talent Group
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
